arts.ttl: Key Real Madrid star could be rested for Lille clash
arts.sum: A leading member of the midfield ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid could be dropped to the bench from the off in the club’s next outing. That’s according to…

arts.ttl: No reunion for Mbappé brothers when Real Madrid visits Lille in the Champions League
arts.sum: Lille coach Bruno Genesio confirmed Tuesday that Kylian’s younger brother Ethan is not fit to play against Real Madrid when the teams meet in the revamped Champions League on Wednesday. I don’t think there are many brothers who have played against each other in the Champions League,” Genesio said.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners, Real Madrid step up interest in South American prospect?
arts.sum: Arsenal and Real Madrid are reportedly stepping up their interest in one of South American football's top prospects.

arts.ttl: Lille vs Real Madrid predictions: Vinicius Junior can light things up in Lille
arts.sum: Gareth Freeman thinks Vinicius Junior looks a good contender for an anytime strike during Real Madrid's Champions League trip to Lille on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid aware of 60-100 ultras that need to be banned as Thibaut Courtois ‘provocations’ are included in report
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid have expelled one fan from the club after the incidents on Sunday night, where Thibaut Courtois was the target of a number of lighters from the Fondo Sur during the Madrid derby. Los Rojiblancos have faced wider calls to expel far-right ultra group Frente Altetico though. arts.ttl: PSG have EXILED a £43m star and already believe Bradley Barcola is the 'new Kylian Mbappe' to lead their new youthful team to glory: Here's why the French champions are a danger to Arsenal tonight
arts.sum: Surprisingly, divested of their last true superstar, they now look better. PSG are unbeaten at the top of Ligue 1, scoring freely, and solid at the back. Mbappe rarely turned up for a defensive shift.

arts.ttl: When Cristiano Ronaldo and Gareth Bale “agreed” to leave Real Madrid in 2013
arts.sum: “The reason is that two weeks earlier he took me to his office and said: ‘Look at those people, they think I’m going to retire, that I’ll be here for another 10 years… but we need to win more Champions Leagues.’” “The reason is that two weeks earlier he took me to his office and said: ‘Look at these people, they think I'm going to retire, that I'm going to be here for another 10 years...
